description_long: This object is a classic double-barrel shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration, featuring a robust metallic construction and a wooden grip and fore-end. The barrels are cylindrical, dark, and metallic, with a slight sheen, and are joined together along their length. The receiver and trigger area are compact, with a visible trigger guard and a rounded, ergonomic wooden handle. The wood appears polished and slightly worn, suggesting frequent handling. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on function and durability. This type of shotgun is commonly seen in urban and rural settings, often used for security or sport.
description: A side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a dark metal finish and polished wooden grip, featuring a compact receiver and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels aligned side-by-side, emphasizing the cylindrical metal construction.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the barrels, the wooden grip, and the trigger guard beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden handle and the back of the receiver, with the barrels extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile mirroring view 1, showing the wooden grip, trigger guard, and the length of the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
